tools_used: CourtListener MCP opinion search and endpoint retrieval
helpful: The provisioned docket snapshot exposed the response request and conference posture.
The petition text included the controlling-law and vehicle record needed for a pre-response forecast.
The paid-petition and originating-circuit statpack cuts provided an auditable baseline.
CourtListener supplied a published post-Southern Union circuit opinion confirming the uniform doctrinal obstacle.
gaps: The statpack lacked the prompt-described salience-band table and a base-rate cut for Court-requested responses.
The Court-requested brief in opposition was not yet due, leaving government merits and vehicle arguments unavailable.
notes: Corpus queries returned useful docket-stage fields but required large ranged reads and were not similarity-ranked by legal issue. The provisioned petition and docket posture were the most informative inputs.
